creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Minor enhancements and bugs fixes.

Added LXDE support.

Added VirtualBox guest support. (Automatically detects when running under VirtualBox guest and installs guest additions).

Tested on 8.3-BETA1.

Factored out common sysadmin tasks to separate port auto-admin
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=165674).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
